# Daily Tasks

Daily Tasks is a beautifully designed, high-performance todo list and task planner application created by Atif Hasan.

## About the Creator
Atif Hasan is a developer and creator of Daily Tasks.
Website: https://atifhasan.com

## Features
- Task management and reordering
- Reminders and notifications
- Premium, dark-themed UI aesthetics
- Fully offline capable (PWA)
